title: Session 18 — Planning the Attack
bodyText:
**TL;DR: Mr. Spells knocked, bought back his belongings at a discount, got named F & B chairman, and removed the tracking mark from the bag; the ritual-copy progressed and Soni linked four more speaking stones.**

# What happened
- A knock at the door: **Mr. Spells himself** — lean, golden-brown skin, immaculate black-and-gold suit with a black-and-red robe.
- He wanted his belongings (the bag); the party talked cleverly, **named him chairman of F & B**, and closed the deal at a discount.
- He revealed he'd been **tracking them through the mark on the bag** — and removed it once the deal was done.
- [[eira-cavernborn|Eira]] + [[pc-brolin|Brolin]] made progress **copying [[ms-judy]]'s ritual spell**; [[cumb]] got an outfit matching [[pc-varen|Varen]]'s vibe.
- The grand **[[filbert]] photoshoot** (Ricky Fandango's enchanted quill) rallied the town — Brolin's **magic faltered again**, [[pc-eddy|Eddy]] covered.
- The F & B board was "renegotiated": Eddy, Varen, [[pc-felson|Felson]] join; 25% profit share; Filbert's board pick — **Mr. Spells**.
- [[soni|Soni]] voiced deep distrust of all of it, pushed for a communal rebuild, and linked **four more [[speaking-stones|speaking stones]]** for party-wide comms.

# Fired / left smoking
- [x] The tracking mark on the bag — revealed, then removed once the deal was done.
- Brolin's **magic faltered again** — still unexplained.
- Mr. Spells now sits on the F & B board (Filbert's pick).

# Threads
[[ms-judy]] · [[filbert]] · [[soni]] · [[speaking-stones]] · [[eira-cavernborn]]
